message:
Fix ArrayList API for Zig 0.15.2 compatibility

Updated all ArrayList usage across lexer, parser, and codegen:
- Changed ArrayList(T).init(allocator) → ArrayList(T){}
- Added allocator parameter to: append(), deinit(), toOwnedSlice()
- Added explicit ParseError type to resolve inferred error sets
- All modules now compile successfully with Zig 0.15.2

Verified working:
- Lexer: Tokenizes Python source (19 tokens for simple test)
- Parser: Builds AST from tokens (4 statements parsed)
- Test: test_pipeline.zig successfully runs

Next: Connect parser output to codegen (AST → Zig code generation)
